trackSelector.title: Learn Agent Identity
trackSelector.subtitle: Choose your learning path based on how much time you have. Each track builds on the previous one.
trackSelector.hint: You can switch tracks anytime. Progress is saved automatically.

bronze.title: Bronze
bronze.subtitle: Why Agents Need Identity
bronze.description: The agent identity crisis, why an agent needs its own identity, and what it means to act on someone's behalf.
bronze.goal: Now I can explain why agents should not share your master key

silver.title: Silver
silver.subtitle: How Delegation Works
silver.description: Permission slips, narrowing scope at every hop, and agent-to-agent delegation chains with a full audit trail.
silver.goal: Now I understand how scoped delegation works

gold.title: Gold
gold.subtitle: Agent Identity Deep Dive
gold.description: The complete course: reaching for tools with MCP, the confused-deputy problem, revocation, and defense in depth.
gold.goal: Now I can reason about agent authorization end to end

bronze.title: Bronze Complete!
bronze.message: You can now explain why an AI agent should carry its own identity and a scoped permission slip, never your master key.

silver.title: Silver Complete!
silver.message: You understand delegation: signed, scoped, short-lived slips that narrow at every hop, with a full actor chain and audit trail.

gold.title: Gold Complete!
gold.message: You can reason about agent authorization end to end, from tools and MCP to the confused-deputy problem, revocation, and defense in depth.
